01

// About

Offensive security, done honestly.

I'm Sumit Khurpade — a final-year B.Tech student in Computer Science (AI & ML) at DKTE, Ichalkaranji, and an early-stage security researcher. My work lives where offensive security meets AI: honeypots that resist fingerprinting, measurement studies of systems that claim to be un-spoofable, and small tools that make the command line safer.

I build the way I want the field to work — containment first, results reported as exactly what they are, and everything verified before it ships. Several of these projects are written up toward IEEE. Away from the terminal, I lead the Cybersecurity Association and run technical events for the Computer Society of India at my institute.

02

// Projects

Things I've built.

Research systems and tools — each one containment-first, tested, and documented.

P-01ACTIVE

DePIN Security Study

mac_dePIN

An offensive-security study of proof-of-physical-work forgery in Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks. A first cross-category taxonomy across coverage, sensing and location, with contained proofs-of-concept run only against self-built reference verifiers and testnets — never live networks — plus measurement of forgeability, detectability, cost and economic incentive, and a defense analysis of what actually holds.

DePINProof-of-LocationMeasurementContainmentIEEE
github.com/waltr0/mac_dePIN STATUS: IEEE-TRACK RESEARCH
P-02SHIPPED

Grounded Deception

ai_Honeypot

A research-grade IoT/SSH honeypot that closes the functional-execution gap: it runs attacker commands for real inside a contained, egress-neutralized micro-sandbox, then reconciles the output with an AI-invented device persona so the fiction stays consistent. Includes a detection-aware reinforcement-learning controller and the FEPR benchmark, with results reported candidly as in-silico. Written up as a full IEEEtran paper.

HoneypotLLMReinforcement LearningSandboxingIEEE
github.com/waltr0/ai_Honeypot STATUS: PAPER + OPEN ARTIFACT
P-03SHIPPED

CyberShell Copilot

smartTerminal

An offline, deterministic shell-command risk-scoring and guardrail CLI. Fourteen subcommands, a determinism guarantee verified across randomized hash seeds, a genuinely adversarial QA pass, and complete documentation — a user manual and a research brief. Packaged and published as cybershell-copilot.

PythonCLIDeterminismSecurity Tooling
github.com/waltr0/smartTerminal STATUS: PACKAGED TOOL
P-04IN DEV

Biometric Identification

bioMetric

A biometric identification system — recognizing individuals from their biometric traits. The full technical write-up is in progress; this entry will be expanded with the modality, matching approach and stack once finalized.

BiometricsIdentificationPattern Recognition
github.com/waltr0/bioMetric STATUS: IN DEVELOPMENT

// Patents

Filed & pending.

Two ideas carried from prototype to patent filing. Both applications are currently in progress.

SHEcurity — Women Safety Analytics

A women-safety application integrating wearables, CCTV analytics and real-time SOS. Recognized as a top-600 idea out of 25,000+ in Eureka! 2024, the E-Cell IIT Bombay startup competition.
